_comment: This is the contract between your reasoning and scripts/render_dashboard_email.py. Produce a JSON file matching this shape, then pass it to the renderer. All text is rendered verbatim (HTML-escaped), so write final, reader-facing zh-TW copy. Omit optional sections by leaving them out or empty.
title: string — project name as it should appear in the header, e.g. 'Claude Code 課程（課程名稱待定）'
week_range: string — the current week window shown in THIS WEEK, e.g. '6/1 - 6/7'

health.summary: one-line zh-TW reason, '・' separated, e.g. 'Stage Gate 1 已逾期（原訂 5/30）・課綱 2.3 尚未定稿・進度受阻'

weekly_diff: OPTIONAL. zh-TW bullet strings describing what changed vs last week's report. Omit entirely on the first run (no prior report found). e.g. '課綱 2.3 由 Not started → WIP，本週進入收尾'

current_stage._percent_help: NUMBER (unquoted) 0-100, computed via the formula in SKILL.md. Emit a bare number like 25, NOT a string "25".
current_stage._stage_index_help: integer — the leading-edge spine stage (1-based). Must match the 'now' stage's position.
current_stage._total_stages_help: integer — number of stages on the delivery spine. The 'stages' array below should have exactly this many entries so the header and per-row numbering agree.

next_milestone.name: milestone / stage-gate name
next_milestone.overdue: boolean — true if due < today and not yet met
next_milestone.criteria: completion criteria, zh-TW. Use ✅ inline for already-met parts.
